title: heterotheca scabrella
intro: Heterotheca scabrella, also known as the gray false goldeneye, is a flowering plant species native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Heterotheca scabrella include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Heterotheca scabrella is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent.
